title: vulgar's Orbital Strike mod
description: adds a fishing rod that upon usage can slam tnt onto your enemies! basically a satellite laser blast or whatever inside minecraft
body: Vulgar's OrbitalStrike is a PvP utility mod that gives server operators a powerful, Configurable TNT strike tool the Orbital Rod. you can configure the blast radius, the power of the blast (how much damage it could deal to a player or a mob) further more it also has a built in theme song player! (read below to understand how to use it) Originally built as an optional addon for my PvPBot mod, but it works perfectly fine as a standalone too Right click any block within 64 blocks and a column of TNT spawns directly one block above it exploding faster than any player can react (unless you're a rival of wallywest) It's sudden and devastating. For now there is only the stab shot, nuke shots will be added in the future. Key Features: - 🎯 Precision targeting strikes exactly where you aim - 💣 Finite-use rods track uses and self-delete when exhausted - 🚫 Dupe-proof renamed or duplicated rods don't work - 🎵 Theme song player integration - ⚙️ Admin only distribution via /giveob stab - 🔒 Unobtainable in survival operators control all access Theme Song Setup Guide: Convert your mp3 to .ogg using an online converter or ffmpeg drop it in .minecraft/config/stabshot/songs/ (create the directory if it doesn't already exist) and run /ts play ingame. No need to include the file extension, to stop the music simply type /ts stop ---------------------------- Built for PvP servers that want a flashy admin distributed nuke tool without handing players access to /summon or command blocks. Drop it as a reward, a punishment, or just pure chaos on your terms **Uh if you want to report bugs or suggest features uh click the button below it will uh (only if you got discord) and uh thats all thanks for checking my mod out**
